## How did you test it?

## Pre-flight checklist

<!-- Tick every box. If one doesn't apply, explain why. -->

- [ ] I ran `cd nodyx-frontend && npm run check` locally — zero errors
- [ ] I ran `cd nodyx-frontend && npm run build` locally — it succeeded
- [ ] (If backend) I ran `cd nodyx-core && npm run build && npm test` — everything passes
- [ ] I visually verified every effect my PR claims (e.g. if I say "offset by +20px", I opened the page and confirmed the offset really applies)
- [ ] My code follows the patterns already present in the file I modified
- [ ] I haven't committed any secrets, tokens, `.env` files, or `node_modules`
